rationale: This candidate provided a complete and high-quality translation of the entire document, including the frontmatter title which was missing in the 'current' and 'qwen3-32b' versions. It maintains Dan's direct, punchy style ('arrêtez d'essayer de faire jouer à S3 le rôle d'une base') and correctly handles technical terminology. It also preserves all MDX structures and code blocks perfectly.
